picks.narrative: Starter quality differential drives this pick: Andre Pallante (3.74 xFIP) has a measurable edge over Merrill Kelly (6.42 xFIP, 5.81 ERA — outperforming their process stats) — model prices STL at 66.9% to win; Pinnacle implies 56.8% (-133) — a 10.1-point gap. Model inputs solid, no critical gaps.

A multi-factor convergence edge: an even pitching matchup (Foster Griffin 4.00 vs. Tim Mayza 4.04 xFIP).
